commonPatterns.name: basic-progress
commonPatterns.description: Simple progress bar at a fixed percentage

commonPatterns.name: labeled-progress
commonPatterns.description: Progress bar with a percentage label
commonPatterns.composition: 75%

antiPatterns.reason: Progress shows a specific percentage; indeterminate loading needs a spinner or skeleton
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Spinner for indeterminate loading states

antiPatterns.scenario: Progress without a visible label or context
antiPatterns.reason: Users cannot interpret the bar without knowing what it represents
antiPatterns.alternative: Pair with a text label describing the metric and its value

semanticMeaning.default: Primary color — general purpose progress indicators
semanticMeaning.brand: Brand color — use in branded contexts or to distinguish from primary progress bars

parentConstraints: Takes full width of parent by default

interactions.valueChange: Indicator translates horizontally with CSS transition

accessibility.screenReader: Announces current value as a percentage via aria-valuenow

rules: Always provide a value prop (0-100) for determinate progress
Provide a visible label or aria-label for context

aiHints.context: Use for determinate progress (known percentage). Supports default (primary) and brand variants. Default uses bg-primary/20 track + bg-primary fill. Brand uses bg-brand-solid/20 track + bg-brand-solid fill. For indeterminate loading, use Spinner.
